name: Very Spicy Delicious Chickpeas
recipeIngredient: 1 small Lime (juice and pulp only, optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wide pot over medium flame.
2. When hot, add the minced onions and garlic; stir until richly browned.
3. Turn heat to low, then add coriander, cumin, cayenne pepper, and turmeric; stir briefly.
4. Add finely chopped tomatoes; stir until mixed with spices and lightly browned.
5. Stir in the chickpeas (drained) and 1 cup water.
6. Add roasted cumin, amchoor, red pepper, garam masala, salt, and lemon juice; stir again.
7. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Remove lid, add minced green chili and grated ginger; cook briefly uncovered.
